name: Morph Cloud API
what_it_does: Morph Cloud provides ultra-fast VM snapshots for AI agent workflows. Agents can pause execution, snapshot state, branch multiple execution paths from one checkpoint, and restore to any prior state — enabling speculative agent execution, fast branching, and efficient compute use in long-running agent tasks.
use_cases: Speculative agent execution: run multiple branches from one checkpoint, keep best result
Caching expensive agent compute states (avoid recomputing from scratch on retry)
Long-running agent tasks that need to pause and resume across model context windows
Agent testing: snapshot before risky operations, restore on failure
Parallel agent exploration from a common starting point
not_for: Simple one-shot code execution (use E2B or Riza instead)
Stateless agent tasks that don't benefit from state management
Teams not comfortable with early-stage infrastructure
best_when: You're building complex agents that need to branch, retry, or resume from checkpoints — especially for long-running tasks or speculative execution.
avoid_when: Your agent tasks are stateless or short-lived. Morph's value is state management across long executions.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Simple model appropriate for developer-facing platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer credits for evaluation; specific limits not public
pricing.paid_tiers: Compute time + snapshot storage. Competitive with cloud VM pricing.
pricing.notes: Early access pricing — may change as product matures.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API is developer-focused and errors are reasonably clear. Snapshot-related errors indicate what went wrong with state management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Snapshots are inherently idempotent. Restoring to a snapshot ID is safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: Very early stage — API surface is likely to change
No MCP server — agents must use REST or SDK
VM snapshot restore adds latency vs. hot VMs
Storage costs for snapshots can add up in heavily branching workflows
Requires designing agent workflows around snapshot checkpoints — not transparent
agent_readiness.security_notes: VM isolation provides good security. Early-stage company — no formal compliance certifications yet.
